title: aspalathus lactea subsp. breviloba
intro: Aspalathus lactea subsp. breviloba, also known as the red bush, is a plant species native to South Africa. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Aspalathus lactea subsp. breviloba, often in the form of tea, may be used to support immune function and provide antioxidant protection.
